columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) who had liver metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Liver", column "SOC + AAP n = 501".
The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) who had liver metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Liver", column "SOC-alone n = 502".
The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) who had lung metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Lung", column "SOC + AAP n = 501".
The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) who had lung metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Lung", column "SOC-alone n = 502".
The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) who had bone metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Bone", column "SOC + AAP n = 501".
The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) who had bone metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Bone", column "SOC-alone n = 502".

The number and percentage of participants in the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) who had distant lymph node metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Distant lymph nodes", column "SOC + AAP n = 501".

The number and percentage of participants in the control arm (SOC-alone) who had distant lymph node metastases is reported in Table 1, page 5, under "Site of metastasesb" row "Distant lymph nodes", column "SOC-alone n = 502".
